name: CLI Tool
description: Command-line tool with argument parsing, commands, output formatting, and tests

plans.name: Project Setup
plans.description: Initialize project, dependencies, and entry point

plans.name: Argument Parser
plans.description: Implement CLI argument parsing with subcommands and help text

phases.name: Commands
phases.description: Implement CLI commands and business logic

plans.name: Core Commands
plans.description: Implement primary CLI commands with input validation

plans.name: Output Formatting
plans.description: Table output, JSON output, colored terminal output

plans.name: Error Handling
plans.description: User-friendly error messages, exit codes, and verbose mode

plans.name: Configuration
plans.description: Config file support, environment variables, defaults

plans.name: Packaging
plans.description: Build scripts, entry points, and distribution setup
